smoking_guns.title: HealthWest: Clean eval → "delusional" in 7 days
smoking_guns.quote: 9/4/2025: No safety issues, ADHD controlled. 9/11/2025: Rule-out delusional disorder
smoking_guns.legal_theory: Weaponized mental health evaluation = due process violation

smoking_guns.title: 37-day custody interference without court order
smoking_guns.quote: Emily withheld LDW for over 37 days without a court order, depriving me of parenting time during a critical bonding period, including Easter and Spring Break.

smoking_guns.title: Fabricated cocaine straw allegation
smoking_guns.quote: Emily alleged that she discovered a straw with suspected cocaine residue in her home and insinuated that I was responsible. Despite a lack of any evidence or history of substance abuse on my part, she has repeatedly referenced this fabricated claim to portray me as an unfit parent.
smoking_guns.legal_theory: Fabricated evidence = fraud upon the court (MCR 2.612(C)(3))

smoking_guns.title: Albert Watson physical aggression at custody exchange
smoking_guns.quote: , during a parenting exchange, Emily’s father, Albert Watson, forcibly removed LDW from my arms and acted aggressively, creating a hostile environment.
smoking_guns.legal_theory: Third-party interference + assault during custody exchange

F1.name: Motion to Set Aside Void Orders (MCR 2.612)
